title: Math Proof Example
subtitle: Proof walkthrough with assumptions and transformations.

sections.heading: Math Proof in use
sections.body: This proof walkthrough demonstrates a complete claim with assumptions, visual intuition, algebraic transformation, and conclusion.

cards.title: Claim
cards.body: The sum of the first n odd numbers is n^2.

cards.title: Method
cards.body: Use induction and a square-growth intuition.

steps.title: Base case
steps.body: For n = 1, the sum is 1, and 1^2 = 1.

steps.title: Add the next odd number
steps.body: The next odd number is 2k + 1, so the next sum is k^2 + 2k + 1.

steps.title: Conclusion
steps.body: The statement holds for k + 1, so it holds for all positive integers n.
